text:
Created attachment 187532
shar

* Updated to the latest version, both RStudio and dependencies
* Removed redundant USES
* Clarified "ONLY_xxx" message

I think RStudio is good to be committed

(portlint produces a bogus warning, I will create a separate bug report for this.)
